mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS "taskId", max(assignee_id) FILTER (WHERE responsibility_level = 'NETWORK') AS "networkId", max(assignee_id) FILTER (WHERE responsibility_level = 'TECHNICIAN') AS "technicianId" FROM dsp_service_assignment WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY task_id
